quotes: Photography: **warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery** — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ). Conveys returning to everyday life and "getting back to themselves."

rules.rule_text: Photography must feature warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery showing real moments of simple, everyday activity (such as walking the dog, beach, or BBQ) to convey returning to everyday life and getting back to themselves.

quotes: Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.

rules.rule_text: Images must be housed in the Accent shape (§2.5) using asymmetric rounded-corner crops instead of plain rectangles or circles.

quotes: Waves and gradients may overlay photography.

rules.rule_text: Waves and gradients may overlay photography.

quotes: Every image requires **descriptive alt text** (brand accessibility rule).

rules.rule_text: Every image must include descriptive alt text to comply with the brand accessibility rule.
